vectors.description: Sign and verify with deterministic DRBG k — key 0x1e5edd45, message 0xdeadbeef

expected.note: DER length asserted in ECDSA.test.ts line 25: encoded.length === 71

vectors.description: Sign with custom k=1358 and verify — same key and message

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: ECDSA.sign(msg, key, undefined, new BigNumber(1358)) verifies true

vectors.description: Verify fails for wrong message — same key and signature

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: verify(wrongMessage, signature, pub) === false

vectors.description: Verify fails for wrong public key — message and signature correct but pubkey mismatched

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: verify(msg, signature, wrongPub) is falsy; wrongPub = curve.g.mul(new BigNumber(33))

vectors.description: forceLowS — signature s value must be <= n/2

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: sign.s.cmp(curve.n.ushrn(1)) <= 0 is truthy

vectors.description: k=1 is valid — boundary case

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: k=1 produces valid signature

vectors.description: k=n-1 is valid — boundary case

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: k=n-1 produces valid signature

vectors.description: k=0 throws — invalid k below range

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: k=0 must throw

vectors.description: k=n throws — invalid k equal to order

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: k=n must throw (k > n-1)

vectors.description: DER hex encoding — signature encodes to 142 hex chars (71 bytes)

expected.note: Asserted in ECDSA.test.ts: signature.toDER('hex').length === 142; fromDER round-trip r/s equal

vectors.description: k·G + (−k·G) = point at infinity (TOB-25 negation identity)

expected.note: ECDSA.test.ts TOB-25: curve.g.mul(k).add(curve.g.mul(k).neg()).isInfinity() === true

vectors.description: Scalar multiplication by zero returns point at infinity (TOB-25)

expected.note: ECDSA.test.ts TOB-25: curve.g.mul(new BigNumber(0)).isInfinity() === true

vectors.description: ECDSA verify rejects point-at-infinity public key (TOB-25)

expected.note: ECDSA.test.ts TOB-25: verify with Point(null, null) throws 'Invalid public key'

vectors.description: Sign/verify with large private key near curve order (mulCT stress)

expected.note: ECDSA.test.ts mulCT stress: large key near n-2 signs and verifies correctly

vectors.description: Signing a message larger than curve order bit length throws (TOB-22)

expected.note: ECDSA.test.ts TOB-22: BigNumber(1).iushln(n.bitLength()+1) causes sign() to throw /message is too large/i

vectors.description: verify returns false when signature r=0

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts: Signature(r=0, s=1) → verify returns false

vectors.description: verify returns false when signature s=0

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts: Signature(r=1, s=0) → verify returns false

vectors.description: verify returns false when r >= n

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts: r == n → verify returns false

vectors.description: verify returns false when s >= n

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts: s == n → verify returns false

vectors.description: verify returns false for message larger than curve order (TOB-22 verify path)

expected.note: ECDSA.test.ts TOB-22: verify(oversizedMsg, validSig, pub) === false

vectors.description: msg = n-1 (truncateToN boundary) — sign and verify succeeds

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts truncateToN: msg = n-1 signs and verifies correctly

vectors.description: forceLowS across multiple messages — all s <= n/2

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts forceLowS: for i in 1..10, all s <= n/2

vectors.description: customK as function — accepts callable that returns BigNumber

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts: customK as function called at least once; result verifies

vectors.description: customK function returning invalid k on first iteration retries

expected.note: ECDSA.additional.test.ts iterative k: k=0 on iter 0, k=1358 on iter 1; callCount >= 2
